After reviewing the provided evidence, I find no direct definition or established synonymy of “malignant pustule” in dermatological literature. While infected squamous cell carcinoma (Option C) could theoretically result in purulent exudate resembling a pustule, there is no documented clinical entity named “malignant pustule” that refers specifically to such a phenomenon.
